evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains multiple play_together blocks with multiple play blocks. Each play block has a unique sound selected.

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/bass_track_1"
play_together
  play "pack/drums_track_2"
  play "pack/bass_track_2"
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains exactly one play_together block with multiple play blocks. Each play block has a unique sound selected.

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/bass_track_1"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains at least one play_together block with multiple play blocks, but some blocks have duplicated sounds selected

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
```}
